mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOHCVUR ( GATE_CD , USER_ID , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , COMPANY_CD , MNG_YN , USER_TYPE , WORK_TYPE , USER_NM , PASSWORD , EMPLOYEE_NO , DEPT_CD , DEPT_NM , POSITION_NM , TEL_NUM , FAX_NUM , CELL_NUM , EMAIL , ZIP_CD , ADDR_1 , ADDR_2 , SMS_FLAG , MAIL_FLAG , BLOCK_FLAG , BLOCK_REASON , PW_WRONG_CNT , PW_RESET_FLAG , PW_RESET_DATE , LAST_LOGIN_DATE , IP_ADDR , USE_FLAG , PROGRESS_CD , CONFIRM_USER_ID , CONFIRM_DATE , DATA_CREATION_TYPE , ERP_IF_ID , ERP_IF_SEND_FLAG , VNGL_ROLE , AGREE_ATT_FILE_NUM , AGREE_YN , AGREE_YN_DATE , DUTY_NM , CHIEF_USER_ID , ROLE_TEXT , ROLE_TEXT_DETAIL , ONES_DUTY_NM , PARENT_DEPT_CD , PARENT_DEPT_NM , EMPLOYEE_NUM , BLOCK_DATE , SITE_USER_ID , GENDER , BIRTH_DATE ) SELECT GATE_CD , USER_ID , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , '1' AS DEL_FLAG , COMPANY_CD , MNG_YN , USER_TYPE , WORK_TYPE , USER_NM , PASSWORD , EMPLOYEE_NO , DEPT_CD , DEPT_NM , POSITION_NM , TEL_NUM , FAX_NUM , CELL_NUM , EMAIL , ZIP_CD , ADDR_1 , ADDR_2 , SMS_FLAG , MAIL_FLAG , BLOCK_FLAG , BLOCK_REASON , PW_WRONG_CNT , PW_RESET_FLAG , PW_RESET_DATE , LAST_LOGIN_DATE , IP_ADDR , USE_FLAG , PROGRESS_CD , CONFIRM_USER_ID , CONFIRM_DATE , DATA_CREATION_TYPE , ERP_IF_ID , ERP_IF_SEND_FLAG , VNGL_ROLE , AGREE_ATT_FILE_NUM , AGREE_YN , AGREE_YN_DATE , DUTY_NM , CHIEF_USER_ID , ROLE_TEXT , ROLE_TEXT_DETAIL , ONES_DUTY_NM , PARENT_DEPT_CD , PARENT_DEPT_NM , EMPLOYEE_NUM , BLOCK_DATE , SITE_USER_ID , GENDER , BIRTH_DATE FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND USER_ID = #{USER_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID , USER_NM AS USER_NM FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND TO_CHAR(LAST_LOGIN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, #{minusMonth}), 'YYYYMMDD') AND USER_TYPE IN ('B','S')

SELECT USER_ID , USER_NM AS USER_NM FROM STOHCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND TO_CHAR(LAST_LOGIN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, #{minusMonth}), 'YYYYMMDD') AND USER_TYPE IN ('B','S')
